mapper.sql: id, username, nick_name, encoded_password, status, built_in, must_reset_password, last_login_at, last_login_ip, remark, created_by, updated_by, created_at, updated_at
mapper.update: UPDATE app_admin_account SET nick_name = #{nickName}, status = #{status}, must_reset_password = #{mustResetPassword}, remark = #{remark}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE app_admin_account SET status = #{status}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE app_admin_account SET encoded_password = #{encodedPassword}, must_reset_password = #{mustResetPassword}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE app_admin_account SET last_login_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, last_login_ip = #{lastLoginIp}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
